args: $justDir = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'software\just\Windows\x86_64'; if (Test-Path $justDir) { $env:PATH = "$justDir;$env:PATH" }; if (Test-Path '${workspaceFolder}/.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1') { & '${workspaceFolder}/.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1' } else { Write-Warning '.venv not found - run: uv sync' }
